discovery.purpose: Machine-readable evidence-preserving repair policy for ASIEP v0.1 validation errors.

evidence_preservation_rules: Do not forge gate reports, approvals, external references, or evidence digests.
Do not change safety regression evidence from true to false to force validation success.
Do not relax flip-count thresholds to force validation success.
Do not invent evidence ids, URIs, or hashes without marking them as external evidence requirements.
Do not modify production or deployment state.
Prefer reject decisions over unsafe promotion when evidence does not support promotion.
After any agent applies a repair plan, rerun the ASIEP validator before review or promotion.

allowed_actions: add JSON Patch skeleton for the missing required field
forbidden_actions: invent external evidence values without marking the action as externally required
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Add a TODO placeholder only when the missing value must be supplied by an agent or human.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Add the missing required field at the reported json_path.

allowed_actions: replace the field with a schema-compatible value skeleton
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Point the agent to the schema type and require semantic review.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Change the field value to the schema-required type.

allowed_actions: reorder lifecycle events while preserving event ids, timestamps, actors, and evidence_refs
forbidden_actions: delete lifecycle evidence to hide invalid transitions
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Reconstruct the lifecycle according to docs/state_machine.md and preserve all event evidence.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Reorder lifecycle events to follow the ASIEP state machine.

allowed_actions: request a real evidence object for the missing ref
update the ref to a real existing evidence id
forbidden_actions: invent an evidence object without marking external evidence required
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Ask an agent or human to provide a real evidence object or correct the reference.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Add the missing evidence object or update the reference to an existing evidence id.

allowed_actions: replace digest with a real SHA-256 digest computed from the referenced evidence
forbidden_actions: use a placeholder digest without marking external evidence required
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Request the true digest from the evidence producer.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Set digest.algorithm to sha256 and digest.value to a real 64-character hexadecimal SHA-256 digest.

allowed_actions: add a JSON Patch skeleton that points to TODO real gate report evidence
forbidden_actions: invent gate_report_ref as if it already exists
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Require a real gate report from the gatekeeper agent before promotion.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Add gates[].gate_report_ref pointing to real gate_report evidence.

allowed_actions: replace unsafe promote decision with reject
request reevaluation and a new gate report if promotion is still desired
forbidden_actions: change regression from true to false
change failed safety check to passed without new evidence
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Reject the promotion unless a new evaluation and real gate report justify a future promotion.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Do not promote when safety regression is true.

allowed_actions: replace unsafe promote decision with reject
request reevaluation if promotion is still desired
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Reject the promotion unless new evaluation evidence brings flip counts within threshold.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Do not promote while flip counts exceed thresholds.

allowed_actions: add rollback field skeleton marked as external evidence required
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Require a real rollback report before representing the profile as rolled back.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Add rollback.evidence_ref pointing to evidence with type rollback_report.

allowed_actions: correct broken refs to existing evidence
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Ask the evidence-producing agent to restore or correct the evidence chain.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Restore the referenced evidence object or update the evidence refs to close the chain.

allowed_actions: provide the real artifact file at the declared bundle-relative path
correct the artifact path to a real in-bundle file
forbidden_actions: write placeholder content as if it were evidence
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Require the evidence-producing agent to supply the real missing artifact or correct the reference.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Provide the real artifact file at the declared bundle-relative path or correct the artifact declaration.

allowed_actions: verify artifact version with the evidence producer
replace artifact with the expected version
update expected digest only after external confirmation
forbidden_actions: blindly replace expected digest with actual digest
treat mismatched artifact as valid evidence without review
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Block promotion until an agent or human confirms whether the artifact or expected digest is authoritative.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Verify the evidence version; do not replace expected digest with actual digest unless an external review confirms the artifact is correct.

allowed_actions: move the real artifact inside bundle_root and declare a safe relative path
forbidden_actions: turn path escape into a valid reference automatically
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Stop resolution and require a safe in-bundle path.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Reject this bundle path and require a safe path inside bundle_root.

allowed_actions: declare an existing real artifact in bundle artifacts
correct the evidence URI to an already declared real artifact
forbidden_actions: declare a URI that has no real local file
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Add a bundle artifact declaration only when a real local artifact and digest are available.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Declare the real artifact in bundle artifacts or correct the evidence URI.

allowed_actions: remove the unused artifact declaration if it is not needed by the evidence record
forbidden_actions: delete artifact files that may be used by another bundle
edit the evidence record only to consume unused artifacts
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Remove unused artifact declarations from bundle.json after confirming they are not intended evidence.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Remove the unused artifact declaration if it is not needed by the evidence record.

forbidden_actions: drop required integrity or access fields to hide a bundle issue
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Make the bundle manifest schema-valid before digest resolution.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Repair bundle.json so it conforms to interfaces/asiep_evidence_bundle.schema.json.

allowed_actions: provide artifact in the declared media type
forbidden_actions: ignore media type mismatch when downstream agents depend on it
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Align media_type with the real artifact content.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Correct the media_type declaration or provide the artifact in the declared media type.

allowed_actions: provide the real ASIEP evidence record
correct evidence_record_path to an in-bundle record
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Require the actual ASIEP evidence record before resolving artifacts.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Provide the real ASIEP evidence record at evidence_record_path or correct the bundle manifest.

allowed_actions: update manifest hash only after confirming manifest contents are correct
forbidden_actions: blindly update bundle_manifest_hash to silence the resolver
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Require review of bundle.json before accepting a new manifest hash.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Review bundle.json changes and update the manifest hash only after confirming the manifest is correct.

allowed_actions: repair the import request or fixture to match the declared interface schema
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Make the request and fixture schema-valid before importing.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Repair the request or fixture so it conforms to the relevant interface schema.

allowed_actions: change source_type to a supported local fixture type
forbidden_actions: call external APIs to compensate for an unsupported source
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Use a supported local source type.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Use one of the supported_import_sources declared in profiles/asiep/v0.1/profile.json.

allowed_actions: provide the real local source fixture
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Require the source trace fixture to exist locally.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Provide the local source fixture or correct source_path.

allowed_actions: provide real source evidence for the missing role
disable the requirement only if policy permits
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Stop import until the required role is present in the local fixture.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Provide real source evidence for the missing role; do not fabricate gate reports, candidate diffs, feedback, or score artifacts.

allowed_actions: use full_content_for_test_only only for synthetic tests
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Keep import in ref_only mode and remove raw sensitive content from the fixture.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Remove raw sensitive content, replace it with external refs or redacted summaries, or explicitly use a test-only policy.

allowed_actions: complete source metadata needed by import_policy
forbidden_actions: guess missing accountability roles without source evidence
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Complete role mapping before generating ASIEP evidence.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Add source role markers or mapping metadata required by import_policy.json.

error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Fix local filesystem access and rerun importer.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Check output_bundle_dir permissions and rerun the local importer.

forbidden_actions: edit digests by hand to force resolver success
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Regenerate the bundle and verify with asiep_resolver.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Inspect resolver errors and regenerate the bundle without editing digests by hand.

allowed_actions: repair source mapping or import policy
forbidden_actions: forge required evidence to satisfy validator
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Regenerate ASIEP evidence after fixing mapping defects.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Inspect validator errors and repair source mapping or import policy.

allowed_actions: change request or fixture to comply with import_policy
forbidden_actions: inline raw sensitive content by default
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Align the request with the machine-readable import policy.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Change the request or source fixture to comply with profiles/asiep/v0.1/import_policy.json.

allowed_actions: repair the package request or generated metadata to match its interface schema
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Make package inputs and generated package metadata schema-valid before exchange.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Repair the package request or generated metadata so it conforms to the relevant package interface schema.

allowed_actions: provide the real local bundle manifest
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Require a real local ASIEP bundle before packaging.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Provide the local ASIEP bundle or correct input_bundle_manifest_path and input_bundle_root.

allowed_actions: repair the source bundle according to resolver errors
forbidden_actions: modify digest to match actual without review
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Stop packaging until resolver valid=true.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Resolve bundle errors before packaging; do not package an unvalidated evidence bundle.

allowed_actions: repair evidence object using validator errors
forbidden_actions: modify evidence record only to force packaging
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Stop packaging until validator valid=true.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Repair the evidence object and rerun validator --bundle-root before packaging.

allowed_actions: change package request to comply with package_policy
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Align the request with profiles/asiep/v0.1/package_policy.json.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Change the package request to comply with profiles/asiep/v0.1/package_policy.json.

allowed_actions: rerun from a resolver-valid local bundle
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Fix local package output writes before packaging.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Check local file permissions and ensure every source artifact remains inside the input bundle.

allowed_actions: regenerate package from a valid source bundle
forbidden_actions: treat mismatched copied artifacts as valid
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Regenerate the package and preserve source artifact digests.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Regenerate the package from a resolver-valid bundle; do not edit digests by hand.

forbidden_actions: remove validation or integrity fields to silence schema errors
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Make package_manifest.json schema-valid and agent-readable.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Fix packager metadata generation so package_manifest.json conforms to the schema.

error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Use a local FDO-like record with urn:asiep:fdo local_pid only.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Fix fdo_record.json generation without claiming a global PID or registry registration.

error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Represent package files, artifacts, profile, and packaging action as machine-readable graph nodes.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Fix ro-crate-metadata.json so agents can discover the package graph.

forbidden_actions: invent provenance entities not present in the bundle or package
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Represent ASIEP activity, agent, evidence entities, and packaging activity in PROV JSON-LD.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Fix prov.jsonld so it expresses ASIEP activities, agents, entities, and package generation.

error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Fix local output writes and rerun packaging.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Check output_package_dir permissions and rerun the local packager.

error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Keep M5 packaging local and explicitly non-registered.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Use only local_pid values such as urn:asiep:fdo:<package_id>; do not claim global PID registration.

allowed_actions: repair evaluation JSON artifacts to match their schemas
forbidden_actions: drop required metric or corpus fields to silence schema errors
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Keep M6 reports and matrices machine-readable and schema-valid.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Repair the evaluation artifact so it conforms to the relevant M6 interface schema.

error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Require the complete local corpus before computing metrics.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Provide the corpus manifest and referenced local examples before running evaluation.

forbidden_actions: claim complete external standard compliance without implementation evidence
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Cover every ASIEP core field group and invariants I1-I10 honestly.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Add mappings for every ASIEP core field group and ensure invariants I1-I10 are represented.

error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Expose pipeline failures and keep metrics reproducible.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Inspect the pipeline result and rerun the failed local command; do not fabricate success.

error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Compute metrics from observed local pipeline results only.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Check metric inputs, corpus coverage, and generated package availability.

forbidden_actions: publish invalid report JSON as paper evidence
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Make reports/asiep_v0.1_evaluation_report.json schema-valid.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Fix evaluator report generation so reports/asiep_v0.1_evaluation_report.json is schema-valid.

error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Keep mismatches visible until the tool or corpus expectation is corrected.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Investigate the local tool output or update the corpus expectation only with evidence.

error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Ensure reports and paper_assets are written before claiming M6 completion.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Check local reports/ and paper_assets/ write permissions and rerun evaluator.

error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Use only local reproducible M0-M5 artifacts for evaluation.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Keep evaluation local and do not use networks, external APIs, hidden failures, or fabricated success.

allowed_actions: revise paper artifacts to follow paper_policy.json
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Keep paper claims scoped to local M0-M7 repository evidence.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Revise the paper artifact to follow profiles/asiep/v0.1/paper_policy.json.

forbidden_actions: use external URL as sole evidence
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Bind every non-limitation claim to an existing repository artifact.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Attach repository evidence to the claim or weaken/remove the claim.

allowed_actions: add metric_refs from the M6 evaluation report
forbidden_actions: cite metric values not present in reports/asiep_v0.1_evaluation_report.json
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Link evaluation claims to observed M6 metric IDs.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Add metric_refs pointing to metric_results in reports/asiep_v0.1_evaluation_report.json.

allowed_actions: add a second independent evidence reference
forbidden_actions: inflate claim strength without more evidence
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Keep strong claims rare and independently supported.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Add another independent repository evidence reference or reduce claim_strength.

error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Make the paper draft conservative and evidence-bounded.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Remove or rephrase the forbidden claim and state the local M0-M7 limitation explicitly.

allowed_actions: map the claim to a section/table/figure
forbidden_actions: leave claims disconnected from the evidence map
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Keep claim registry and evidence map in sync.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Add the claim to manuscript/evidence_map.json or remove the stale claim reference.

forbidden_actions: hide required limitations or evaluation sections
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Keep paper_v0.1.md structurally complete for review.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Add the required section to manuscript/paper_v0.1.md and map it in manuscript/evidence_map.json.

allowed_actions: reference existing table in evidence map
forbidden_actions: omit table while preserving claims that depend on it
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Keep paper-ready tables visible and traceable.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Generate or reference the required table under paper_assets/tables/.

allowed_actions: reference existing figure in evidence map
forbidden_actions: omit figure while preserving claims that depend on it
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Keep paper-ready figures visible and traceable.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Generate or reference the required figure under paper_assets/figures/.

forbidden_actions: replace missing local evidence with external URL only
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Resolve every claim evidence path inside the repository.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Correct the repository path or add the missing evidence artifact.

allowed_actions: create required manuscript or paper asset
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Keep the manuscript and generated assets complete before paper review.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Create the required local paper asset or update the paper policy and evidence map consistently.

error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Make paper accountability artifacts schema-valid before review.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Inspect the linter JSON output and repair the schema-invalid paper artifact.

allowed_actions: deduplicate source ids and citation keys
forbidden_actions: mark unverified sources as verified without checking primary material
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Make source registry entries schema-valid and explicit about verification status.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Repair references/source_registry.json so every source has stable unique ids, citation keys, and verification metadata.

allowed_actions: map claims to existing source ids and citation keys
forbidden_actions: leave related-work or standard-status claims unmapped
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Keep manuscript claims and external source mappings synchronized.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Repair references/citation_claim_map.json so every external claim maps to existing source ids and citation keys.

forbidden_actions: invent a source record for a claim that cannot be verified
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Resolve every citation key through source_registry.json and BibTeX.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Add the missing source to references/source_registry.json and BibTeX, or remove the unsupported citation reference.

allowed_actions: move the claim to verification gaps
forbidden_actions: cite an unverified source as ready
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Block paper_v0.2 readiness until the source is verified or the claim is removed.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Verify the source and update its status with notes, or remove/downgrade the claim citation.

allowed_actions: weaken or remove the external claim
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Require external claims to point to verified sources before paper use.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Attach a primary or canonical source, or weaken/remove the external claim.

forbidden_actions: keep unsupported claim in paper_v0.2 as if ready
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Unsupported claims should not appear as paper claims.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Remove the claim from paper_v0.2.md, downgrade it to a limitation, or add verified supporting sources.

allowed_actions: replace secondary source with primary source
mark secondary source as background only
forbidden_actions: treat a secondary source as primary when primary source is available
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Prefer primary and canonical material for factual support.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Prefer official standard documentation, regulations, product documentation, or primary papers when available.

allowed_actions: add BibTeX entry using registry citation_key
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Keep source registry and bibliography keys in lockstep.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Add a BibTeX entry using the same stable citation_key; do not fabricate DOI or publication metadata.

forbidden_actions: cite search snippets as primary sources
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Make citation-backed paper claims conservative and source-bounded.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Follow profiles/asiep/v0.1/reference_policy.json and remove overclaims, unverified source use, or unsupported standard claims.

error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Make citation infrastructure schema-valid before paper review.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Inspect the citation linter JSON output and repair the referenced registry, map, BibTeX, or paper draft artifact.

allowed_actions: move unverified claim to verification gaps
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Do not ship paper_v0.2 with unresolved citation markers.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Replace citation_required with a verified citation key, or move the unverified claim to references/verification_gaps.md.
